content.thinking: The review comment says that in `dispatch_sonarr.go`, the `update_series_profile` case returns early on error, bypassing the common error logging at the end. It should instead set `err` and `break` like `dispatch_radarr.go` does. Let me look at both files.

content.text: One review comment: in `dispatch_sonarr.go`, the `update_series_profile` case returns early on `GetSeries` error instead of using the common error logging path. Let me look at the code.

content.thinking:
The review comment is valid. Looking at the Sonarr dispatch, I see three places where `GetSeries`/`GetEpisodes` errors cause early returns instead of using the common error path:

1. Line 125-127: `update_series_monitoring` case
2. Line 199-201: `monitor_season_episodes` case  
3. Line 220-222: `update_series_profile` case (the one specifically called out)

The reviewer only called out line 220-222, but for consistency I should fix all three. Let me also check `update_series_monitoring` - it has more logic after the GetSeries call (the season finding loop), so it's a bit different. 

I'm noticing that `monitor_season_episodes` also has post-fetch logic, and both `update_series_monitoring` and `monitor_season_episodes` have their own error returns for different scenarios—like when a season isn't found or no episodes match the criteria. These are distinct from the API errors, so I need to be careful about which ones to consolidate.

The reviewer's concern is specifically about API errors that skip the logger, so I should focus on fixing those three `getErr` early returns while leaving the validation errors alone.

content.text: The reviewer is right — the `getErr` early returns bypass the error logging at line 230-232. I also see the same pattern in `update_series_monitoring` (line 125-127) and `monitor_season_episodes` (line 199-201). Let me fix all three for consistency.

input.command:
git add internal/agent/dispatch_sonarr.go && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: route GetSeries/GetEpisodes errors through common logging path

Early returns on getErr in dispatch_sonarr.go bypassed the shared error
logging at the end of the function. Use err = getErr + break instead,
matching the pattern in dispatch_radarr.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text: Fixed and pushed. The change routes `getErr` from `GetSeries`/`GetEpisodes` calls through the common error logging path (line 230-232) instead of returning early — matching the pattern in `dispatch_radarr.go`. Applied to all three affected cases: `update_series_monitoring`, `monitor_season_episodes`, and `update_series_profile`.
